columns.name: AlertSeverity
columns.description: Severity of the threat. One of INFORMATIONAL, LOW, MEDIUM, HIGH, or CRITICAL.

columns.name: AlertTime
columns.description: Time when the threat was discovered.

columns.name: Application
columns.description: Suspected traffic's application type-for example, SSH.

columns.name: AuthenticationInfoPrincipalEmail
columns.description: Email address of the authenticated user or service account initiating the request.

columns.name: AuthorizationInfo
columns.description: Information about permissions or roles evaluated for the operation.

columns.name: _BilledSize
columns.description: The record size in bytes

columns.name: Category
columns.description: Sub-type of the threat.

columns.name: CVEs
columns.description: A list of CVEs associated with the threat.

columns.name: DestinationIPAddress
columns.description: Suspected traffic's destination IP address.

columns.name: DestinationPort
columns.description: Suspected traffic's destination port.

columns.name: Details
columns.description: Additional information about the type of threat.

columns.name: Direction
columns.description: Suspected traffic's direction (client-to-server or server-to-client).

columns.name: ElapsedTime
columns.description: The elapsed time of the session.

columns.name: InsertId
columns.description: A unique identifier for the log entry.

columns.name: IPProtocol
columns.description: Suspected traffic's IP protocol.

columns.name: _IsBillable
columns.description: Specifies whether ingesting the data is billable. When _IsBillable isfalseingestion isn't billed to your Azure account

columns.name: JsonPayloadName
columns.description: Threat name.

columns.name: JsonPayloadType
columns.description: Type of the threat.

columns.name: LogName
columns.description: The full log name including resource path.

columns.name: MethodName
columns.description: Name of the API method or function that was invoked.

columns.name: Network
columns.description: The network associated with the IDS endpoint.

columns.name: NumResponseItems
columns.description: Number of items returned in the response, if applicable.

columns.name: OperationFirst
columns.description: Indicates if this is the first log entry in a sequence of operations.

columns.name: OperationId
columns.description: Unique identifier for the operation, useful for tracking and correlating across logs.

columns.name: OperationLast
columns.description: Indicates if this is the last log entry in a sequence of operations.

columns.name: OperationProducer
columns.description: Component or service that generated the operation.

columns.name: PayloadType
columns.description: Type or format of the payload associated with the request.

columns.name: ReceiveTimestamp
columns.description: Time the log entry was received by Cloud Logging.

columns.name: RepeatCount
columns.description: The number of sessions with the same source IP, destination IP, application, and type seen within 5 seconds.

columns.name: RequestEndpointId
columns.description: Unique identifier of the endpoint that handled the request.

columns.name: RequestEndpointName
columns.description: Name of the endpoint to which the request was sent.

columns.name: RequestEndpointNetwork
columns.description: Network path or name through which the endpoint was accessed.

columns.name: RequestEndpointSeverity
columns.description: Severity associated with the endpoint in the context of threat detection or access.

columns.name: RequestEndpointThreatExceptions
columns.description: Threat exceptions applied to the endpoint for this request, if any.

columns.name: RequestEndpointTrafficLogs
columns.description: Details or references to traffic logs related to the endpoint request.

columns.name: RequestMetadataCallerIP
columns.description: IP address of the caller who initiated the request.

columns.name: RequestMetadataDestinationAttributes
columns.description: Metadata attributes about the destination service or resource.

columns.name: RequestMetadataRequestAttributesAuth
columns.description: Authentication-related request attributes, such as tokens or auth levels.

columns.name: RequestMetadataRequestAttributesReason
columns.description: Reason for the request, such as a policy action or user-initiated change.

columns.name: RequestMetadataRequestAttributesTime
columns.description: Timestamp of when the request attributes were recorded.

columns.name: RequestName
columns.description: Name or identifier of the resource being accessed or modified in the request.

columns.name: RequestParent
columns.description: Parent resource of the request, indicating hierarchy or context.

columns.name: RequestType
columns.description: Type of request.

columns.name: RequestUpdateMaskPaths
columns.description: The paths to be updated in the request.

columns.name: ResourceLabelsId
columns.description: Unique identifier for the resource involved in the log entry.

columns.name: ResourceLabelsLocation
columns.description: Geographic or regional location of the resource.

columns.name: ResourceLabelsMethod
columns.description: The method or operation performed on the resource, often linked to an API call or service method.

columns.name: ResourceLabelsProjectId
columns.description: Project ID associated with the resource, typically representing the Google Cloud project.

columns.name: ResourceLabelsResourceContainer
columns.description: Name of the container or logical grouping the resource belongs to (e.g., folder, organization).

columns.name: ResourceLabelsService
columns.description: Service label indicating which cloud service.

columns.name: ResourceLocationCurrentLocations
columns.description: Current physical or logical location(s) of the resource at the time of the log entry.

columns.name: ResponseName
columns.description: Name or ID of the resource returned in the response.

columns.name: ResponseNetwork
columns.description: Network path or identifier associated with the response.

columns.name: ResponseSeverity
columns.description: Severity level of the response, especially in the context of errors or alerts.

columns.name: ResponseState
columns.description: State or result of the response action taken for the detected threat.

columns.name: ResponseThreatExceptions
columns.description: List of any threat exceptions applied during the response, allowing specific threats to bypass enforcement.

columns.name: ResponseTrafficLogs
columns.description: Indicates whether traffic logs were captured for the session or threat response.

columns.name: ResponseType
columns.description: Type or format of the response returned from the operation.

columns.name: ServiceName
columns.description: Name of the cloud service associated with the log entry or threat detection.

columns.name: SessionId
columns.description: An internal numerical identifier applied to each session.

columns.name: Severity
columns.description: Indicates the severity level of the log entry or event.

columns.name: SourceIPAddress
columns.description: Suspected traffic's source IP address.

columns.name: SourcePort
columns.description: The source port of the traffic.

columns.name: SourceSystem
columns.description: The type of agent the event was collected by. For example,OpsManagerfor Windows agent, either direct connect or Operations Manager,Linuxfor all Linux agents, orAzurefor Azure Diagnostics

columns.name: StartTime
columns.description: The time of the session start.

columns.name: Status
columns.description: Status of the operation or request, such as SUCCESS, FAILURE, or ERROR.

columns.name: TenantId
columns.description: The Log Analytics workspace ID

columns.name: ThreatId
columns.description: Unique threat identifier.

columns.name: TimeGenerated
columns.description: The timestamp when the log entry was generated and ingested by the logging system.

columns.name: Timestamp
columns.description: The original timestamp of the event as recorded by the source system.

columns.name: TotalBytes
columns.description: The total number of bytes transferred in the session.

columns.name: TotalPackets
columns.description: The total number of packets transferred in the session.

columns.name: Type
columns.description: The name of the table

columns.name: URIOrFilename
columns.description: URI or filename of the relevant threat, if applicable.
